text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's definitely gonna win this! I bet she's
gonna show us another great performance like
she did at the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text: You say that, but Yaeno Muteki and Sakura Chiyono O are also running today. I'd say this race is still up in the air.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day we'll know for certain how Inari
One will fare in a race without Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Don't get lost under the pressure... Prove that you
have what it takes!

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, Inari One!
You can do it! Goooo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect anythin' less from the final 'n'
biggest race of the first half of the year—but oof.
The pressure here's so intense I can barely
breathe.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(It's no wonder, though. Everyone here's just as
determined as I am to win.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(But I'm not gonna hand over victory to anyone.
I'm gonna be the one to grab first place today!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I can't become Umamusume of the Year unless I beat everyone here!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...It's okay. I know I can do it!
